/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -no-pie -rdynamic CMakeFiles/udp_send_test.dir/examples/multi_pc_udp_send.cpp.o -o udp_send_test   -L/home/kicheol/quadruped-forklift-stabilizer/unitree_legged_sdk/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kicheol/quadruped-forklift-stabilizer/unitree_legged_sdk/lib -pthread -lunitree_legged_sdk_amd64 -llcm
